title: Layer 2B - Format sub-port contract
description: Results-in / LLM-ready-document-out. The first of Layer 2B's two ports (the other is store.schema.json). FORMAT takes vendor-neutral, pre-extracted results and renders ONE layout-stable Markdown document plus a parallel JSON sidecar carrying identical data, ordered by descending relevance, paginated, with near-duplicate dedup folded in and progressive disclosure (index vs full vs auto). There is NO output-length cap: body_char_budget only triggers a resolver offload of the RENDERED view; the full body always stays in the sidecar (and the store) and is recoverable by id. The optional anthropic_search_result_blocks view down-renders 1:1 into Anthropic search_result content blocks (a derived, vendor-specific view; Layer 3 owns the citations-vs-structured-output toggle).

Highlight.description: A query-relevant span supplied by an upstream engine (e.g. Exa highlights). Pass-through metadata; FORMAT never synthesizes or truncates content to produce these.

ResultInput.description: One vendor-neutral result. The union of what Layer 1 (url/title/published_date/site/score/lang) and Layer 2A (body_markdown/summary/page_type/quality_score/content_hash) supply. A backend's native shape is mapped onto this by the caller, never the other way around.

id.description: Stable opaque resolver id. When null, FORMAT derives a deterministic id from the canonical url so the same url always resolves to the same id.

url.description: Canonical URL. The dedup key, the Anthropic source, and the resolver handle.

site.description: Display site/host. Derived from url when null.

score.description: Relevance score; results are ordered by this descending. Missing scores sort last in stable input order.

summary.description: Optional pass-through summary supplied by an upstream engine. FORMAT never generates this.

body_markdown.description: Full clean Markdown body. NEVER truncated in storage or in the sidecar; the source for full-mode rendering.

body_blocks.description: Pre-chunked passages for per-passage citation. When empty, FORMAT derives blocks from body_markdown (heading/paragraph aware).

content_hash.description: Hash of the normalized body for byte-exact dedup. Derived from body_markdown when null.

token_estimate.description: Caller-supplied token estimate of the body. Computed by FORMAT when null.

DedupParams.description: Near-duplicate handling. Byte-exact (content hash) runs first, then MinHash near-dup clustering on the survivors, keeping one canonical per cluster and folding the rest into dropped_duplicates.

jaccard_threshold.description: Estimated-Jaccard at/above which two bodies are near-duplicates. 0.9 is conservative; lower for heavy boilerplate.

shingle_size.description: Word n-gram size for shingling; bodies shorter than this fall back to character shingles.

query.description: The originating query, echoed into the header and sidecar.

results.description: Pre-extracted results. Need not be pre-ordered or pre-deduped; FORMAT orders by score descending and dedups.

page.description: Zero-based page index over the deduped, ordered result set.

mode.description: auto = render full bodies inline when the page's estimated tokens fit inline_token_budget, otherwise index. index = preview (one highlight/summary/snippet) + stable id, full body fetched on demand via the store resolver. full = inline every body (subject to body_char_budget offload of the RENDERED view only).

body.description: In index mode, which compact preview to show per result: a top highlight, the summary field, or the leading text of the body. The full body is always recoverable by id regardless.

inline_token_budget.description: auto mode renders the page full when its estimated tokens are at or below this, else index. Mitigates needless resolver round-trips for small result sets.

body_char_budget.description: Per-result soft budget for the RENDERED Markdown body in full mode. A longer body is shown up to the budget with a resolve hint; the FULL body is never discarded (it stays in the sidecar and the store, recoverable by id). This is a progressive-disclosure offload trigger, NOT a content cap. null inlines every body in full, no offload.

include_sidecar.description: Emit the parallel JSON sidecar (identical data).

include_anthropic_blocks.description: Emit the derived anthropic_search_result_blocks view in the sidecar.

anthropic_citations.description: When include_anthropic_blocks, set citations.enabled on EVERY block (Anthropic requires citations be all-or-nothing across a request). A caller that also uses structured outputs must set this false (citations + output_config.format is an API error).

chars_per_token.description: Divisor for the dependency-free token estimate (ceil(chars/divisor)); 4 is OpenAI's documented rule of thumb. Lower (e.g. 3.5) over-estimates for dense markdown/code. Callers may inject a real tokenizer instead.

similarity.description: Estimated Jaccard to the canonical (null for a byte-exact duplicate).

FormattedResult.description: One result as echoed in the sidecar: the lossless data view of the rendered block.

rank.description: 1-based position in the deduped, descending-relevance set (rank == position).

body_markdown.description: The FULL body, verbatim, in BOTH index and full modes (the sidecar is the lossless program-side record; only the rendered Markdown VIEW is offloaded, never the sidecar data). null only when the input carried no body. The store resolver is the alternative recovery path when a caller keeps the Markdown but discards the sidecar.

body_blocks.description: Citation chunks; the minimal citable unit.

rendered_full.description: Whether the Markdown view inlined this body in full.

truncated_in_markdown.description: Whether the Markdown VIEW showed only body_char_budget chars with a resolve hint. The sidecar/store still hold the full body.

dedup_of.description: Set on a result that is itself a folded duplicate (normally absent; duplicates are dropped, not emitted).

dropped_duplicates.description: Near/exact duplicates folded into this canonical result.

AnthropicSearchResultBlock.description: A derived view that maps 1:1 onto an Anthropic messages-API search_result content block. source is a bare URL/identifier STRING (not a nested object). content has at least one non-empty text block. citations/cache_control are omitted entirely (never null) when not used.

citations.description: Present only when emitted. All blocks in one request must agree (all enabled or all disabled).

FormatSidecar.description: The parallel JSON view. Carries the same data as the Markdown document; either may be dropped, and the full result set is recoverable from the other (the Markdown carries stable ids + a resolve hint when a body was offloaded).

next_cursor.description: Opaque next-page cursor; null on the last page.

mode.description: The RESOLVED render mode for this page (auto collapses to one of these).

anthropic_search_result_blocks.description: Populated only when include_anthropic_blocks is set; one block per result on the page.

markdown.description: The single layout-stable Markdown document for this page.

FormatResponse.description: An Envelope whose meta.layer is "format" and whose data is a FormatPayload (or null on error).
